_comment: Default guardrails used by kb_hook_guard.py before the DB sync runs (kb_guard_sync.py writes the live set to ~/.claude/team-guardrails.json each session). Built-in critical rules are hardcoded in kb_hook_guard.py and always on. Patterns are regexes matched against the Bash command.

deny.reason: Unscoped DELETE (no WHERE) would wipe the whole table.

ask.reason: Removing a stored NAS credential -- confirm first.
